creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Can you show error log? Also, changes should be submitted upstream first. Without upstreaming aarch64 support will degrade over time. If unlucky this can happen as soon as the next Firefox release. I can't submit to Skia upstream on your behalf due to lack of Google Account and can't help with libc crate due to lack of aarch64 hardware (bug 221185).
